title: P21: Terms glossary — template section, exploring pin rule, scribing inheritance
action: Three coordinated prose edits. (1) In skills/bee-exploring/references/context-template.md add an optional '## Terms' section (after Locked Decisions / Agent's Discretion, before Specific Ideas): a two-column table (Term | Meaning in this feature) with the template's remove-if-unused convention — one line of guidance: pin a fuzzy domain word here the moment Socratic locking settles its meaning. (2) In skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md, add one line: step 4 pins settled fuzzy terms into the Terms section same turn, and step 5 (Context Assembly) lists Terms among the CONTEXT.md contents it includes. (3) In skills/bee-scribing/SKILL.md's input-mapping table (the row citing gate-locked CONTEXT.md at line ~43), add that CONTEXT.md's Terms section seeds the spec's Data Dictionary — same row or one new row, matching table format. Section name must be exactly 'Terms' in all three files. Then sync installed copies: cp of the three changed files to their ~/.claude/skills/ counterparts.

truths: A fuzzy term settled during locking has a defined home in CONTEXT.md and a stated inheritance path into specs

artifacts.substantive: optional ## Terms table section with pin guidance
input table maps CONTEXT.md Terms -> Data Dictionary

key_links: exploring SKILL.md, context-template.md, and scribing SKILL.md all name the section 'Terms' identically
installed copies identical to repo source after sync
prohibitions: No new skill or reference file
Existing CONTEXT.md files stay valid — the section is optional, never required retroactively
Do not touch scribing's spec template in references/scribing-reference.md beyond nothing — SKILL.md line only

verify: grep -q '## Terms' skills/bee-exploring/references/context-template.md && grep -q 'Terms' skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md && grep -q 'Terms' skills/bee-scribing/SKILL.md && diff -q skills/bee-exploring/references/context-template.md "$HOME/.claude/skills/bee-exploring/references/context-template.md" && diff -q skills/bee-scribing/SKILL.md "$HOME/.claude/skills/bee-scribing/SKILL.md" && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs

trace.outcome: Terms glossary shipped: optional ## Terms table in context-template.md with pin guidance; exploring step 4 pins settled fuzzy terms same turn + step 5 lists pinned terms in CONTEXT.md contents; scribing input table maps CONTEXT.md Terms -> Data Dictionary; all three installed copies synced. RED: '## Terms' and 'Terms' greps exit 1 pre-edit. GREEN: marker greps hit, three diffs clean, test_lib 124/0, judge intact.
trace.verify_command: grep Terms markers in template+exploring+scribing && diff -q all three repo vs installed && test_lib
